task_description: Create bilingual FOODLAW.ai landing page (Astro+Tailwind), supplemental.pl AI tools page, improve GitHub Actions workflow (PR-based, validation, reporting), and add new data source scrapers (RASFF, health claims, novel food).

verification.summary: Website builds successfully (3 pages: PL, EN, supplemental). All 98 pytest tests pass (63 new + 35 existing). YAML workflow validates. All new scripts respond to --help. Shared HTTP client module imports correctly.
